did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a hardware-based system using an Arduino Uno, ML8511 UV sensor, and ESP32 microcontroller to measure UV ray intensity, which is then displayed on an Android application. While the title mentions 'Dermoscopy Images,' the provided text does not describe any AI, machine learning, or computer vision methods for analyzing these images; the system focuses on UV intensity monitoring rather than image-based diagnosis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
